ideation: This animation sequence will depict a goat's head-butting motion.  Since our robot lacks a head, we'll simulate the headbutt using the arms. The movement will be forceful and slightly clumsy, reflecting a goat's energetic nature. The animation will focus on the left arm, with the right arm providing a counterbalance.  We'll use a three-frame sequence to capture the essence of the movement. Frame 1 will show both arms in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the left arm thrusting forward, and Frame 3 will show the left arm recoiling slightly after the impact.  The right arm will remain largely static to provide a point of reference for the left arm's movement.

frames.beat: both arms neutral, ready to charge
left arm thrusts forward in a powerful headbutt
left arm recoils slightly after the impact
